title: Associate Engineer/Engineer(Facilities)
description:
• Oversee all the new construction/installation of production and office expansion project and actively involved in all the design work and specification before finalisation or design freeze.
  • Work closely with Industrial Engineering(IE) team and end users to define project intention and translate the intention into installed system to meet the its function and performance.
  • Coordinate for any new tools and utilities hook up or tools relocation activities.
  • Responsible for coordinating and supervising subcontractors works on site to ensure compliance to internal Safety guidelines and jobs specification.
  • Ensure timely completion, safety and quality standards of project works.
  • Prepare and update all site reports and closely monitor the progress of the project including submission of weekly report to Director.
  • Liaise with end user/IE to define the scope of work, work methods, technical specifications of the services.
  • Generate Request For Quote(RFQ) and arrange sitewalk with contractors to explain the project/hookup expectations.
  • Perform project cost estimation, participating in technical/engineering evaluation of all bidding packages with Purchasing.
  • After completion of project, responsible to ensure all payments are regularized, projects are buy-off according to procedures. Project closure documentation are obtained like O&M manual, as built drawings, T&C records, all regulatory certificate, Spare part listing and contractor/vendor listing.
  • Oversee the facility gas operation and maintenance, including but not limited to ad hoc job such as regulator replacement, filter replacement, etc.
  • Drive new materials & second source materials qualifications for cost optimisation.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties assigned by Director/Manager.

What we’re looking for

  • Diploma. Degree in any Engineering.

  • Minimum 1–2 years of relevant working experience for Degree.   

  • Possess good project management skills, e.g. able to identify critical path and well verse in Project planning.

  • Possess good supervision and management skill especially contractor management.

  • Possess good supervision and management for Project Safety execution and Code compliance especially like working at height, hoisting & Hot Work.

  • Possess strong proficiency in MS Powerpoint/Excel application is needed. Familiarity with authorities’ requirements will be an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Join a leader in the industry!


STATS ChipPAC, a member of the JCET Group, is the world’s leading integrated-circuit manufacturing and technology services provider, offering a full range of turnkey services encompassing semiconductor package integration design and characterization, R&D, wafer probe, wafer bumping, package assembly, final test and drop shipment to customers around the world. Ranked as the third largest Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) company, opportunities abound in growth and development as we continue to push towards new heights in this highly competitive field. Our comprehensive portfolio covers a wide spectrum of semiconductor applications servicing the telecommunications, consumer, automotive and other industries through advanced wafer level packaging, 2.5D/3D, System-in-Packaging, and reliable flip chip and wire bonding technologies. Our global footprint spans over 2 top-notched R&D facilities and 6 manufacturing locations in the Asia Pacific region, with global sales outreach as our sales network provide close technology collaboration and efficient supply-chain manufacturing to our global customers.


Join us and expand your world.
postedCompany.name: STATS CHIPPAC PTE. LTD.
